parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
abstract class Pizza {
  + void prepare()
  + void bake()
  + void cut()
  + void box()
}

class OrderPizza

interface AbsFactory {
  + Pizza createPizza();
}

class LDPepperPizza
class LDCheesePizza
class BJPepperPizza
class BJCheesePizza

class LDFactory
class BJFactory

OrderPizza o-- AbsFactory

Pizza <|-- LDPepperPizza
Pizza <|-- LDCheesePizza
Pizza <|-- BJPepperPizza
Pizza <|-- BJCheesePizza

AbsFactory <|.. LDFactory
AbsFactory <|.. BJFactory

LDFactory ..> LDPepperPizza
LDFactory ..> LDCheesePizza

BJFactory ..> BJPepperPizza
BJFactory ..> BJCheesePizza

@enduml
```
